description_long: This object is a cylindrical roll of band-aid material, featuring a soft, fabric-like texture in a light beige color. The roll is wound tightly, with a flat strip extending outward, suggesting it is ready to be cut or torn for use. The surface of the material displays a subtle woven pattern, giving it a slightly textured, matte appearance. The edges of the roll are clean and even, with no visible branding or printed markings. The band-aid material appears flexible and is likely composed of a combination of fabric and adhesive layers. There is no visible packaging or wrapper enclosing the roll.
description: A cylindrical roll of light beige, fabric-textured band-aid material with a flat strip extending outward. The surface is matte and subtly woven, with no visible branding or packaging.
description_view_0: The end of the cylindrical roll is visible, showing the tightly wound band-aid material and the start of the flat strip extending outward.
description_view_1: A direct view of the roll from the front, highlighting the full width of the band-aid strip and the even, fabric-textured surface.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the roll is shown, similar to view 0, with the band-aid strip extending to the left.
description_view_3: A side view of the roll, displaying the cylindrical shape and the woven texture of the band-aid material.
attribute_packaging_design: No packaging is visible; the object is a bare cylindrical roll of band-aid material with a flat strip extending outward. The color is uniform beige with a subtle woven texture and no graphics or text.
attribute_adhesive_strip_pattern: The adhesive strip area has a uniform, fabric-like woven texture with no visible perforations, color differences, or printed markings.
